problem id: 4736daab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00111101 -> 11010001
  11001101 -> 11010110
  01100111 -> 01110011
  01001011 -> 10110010
  11101110 -> 11100111
  00110010 -> 00100001
  10111011 -> 10110101
  10011011 -> 10110100
  01000101 -> 01010010

query: 11110100
predicted answer: 01000111
